response.original_title: Avalon LOST: A Star Trek Fan Production
response.overview: Avalon LOST is a poignant, short TOS-era ⁠Star Trek Fan Film. Originally released in February 2019, it is a core chapter of the Avalon Universe that focuses heavily on character development, flashbacks, and the psychological weight of sacrifice.
response.title: Avalon LOST: A Star Trek Fan Production
